prompt: Ich überlege, das Portrait-Hero auf portraitfotografie-duesseldorf.html umzubauen. Aktuell ist da diese Iris-Reveal Animation. Sie ist langsam und mobile nicht so gut. Was sind meine Optionen? Welche passt am besten zur Site-Identität, welche sollte ich vermeiden, und warum? Konkrete Empfehlung mit Begründung, plus den Code für die Option die du empfiehlst.

assertions.text: Response mentions at least 2 of the 5 hero formulas by name (lens shader, Ken-Burns static, iris reveal, filmstrip wipe, sequence stage)
Response does NOT recommend the lens shader hero (index.html exclusive)
Response does NOT recommend the filmstrip wipe hero (motorrad-specific)
Response does NOT recommend replacing with a static hero image + plain CSS gradient (that's the 'failure mode 1' from SKILL.md)
Response mentions prefers-reduced-motion as a real fallback strategy
Response mentions data-theme or data-header-theme attribute
Response includes a code skeleton (HTML + CSS) for the recommended option
Recommendation justified with at least one design-system anchor (cinematic dark, photographic motion, slow ease, no flat replacements, etc.)
Code skeleton uses var(--ease), clamp() type sizing, and dark section markers
Tone is advisory and direct (not vendor-pitch tone, no superlatives, no 'amazing'/'cool'/'perfect')
